title: 3D Arsenal
description: A texture pack that makes Arsenal weapons 3D!
body:
Ever thought that the arsenal weapons were boring for being 2D? well, here's a resource pack
that makes them 3D!

I used the original L'Ancre model for the Anchorblade and made a crappy model for the scythe from scratch

also, it doesn't work with supporter cosmetics, only default skins
